summary: Full backend+frontend verification of Credit Card Optimizer (new) + Biometric Unlock (new) + Referral-Share regression. Health check 14/14 PASS, pytest 14/14 PASS for /api/cards, end-to-end Card Optimizer UI verified including category switching (fuel→BPCL SBI Octane), spend slider live updates (₹10K→₹25K → annual reward ₹8,700→₹21,750), and Apply button firing POST /api/cards/click with correct payload + opening issuer URL in new tab. Biometric correctly gated on PlatformAuthenticator availability — gracefully hidden in headless browser (expected). All 4 bottom tabs render. Membership referral_code regression intact.
critical_code_review_comments: cards.py: CARDS catalog is hard-coded in module-level constant — fine for MVP but eventually should be DB-backed so issuer rates can be updated without redeploy.

cards.py: /api/cards/click endpoint silently swallows DB failures and always returns {ok:true}. This is intentional (best-effort attribution) but consider adding an X-Logged: false header or counter metric so silent failures don't go undetected.
HistoryScreen.handleShare correctly embeds referral_code only when memberStatus?.referral_code exists (Pro members) — P0 share regression intact.
PinLock.jsx auto-prompts biometric on mount only when enrolled AND platform authenticator available — keypad fallback always rendered (verified by login flow using keypad).
test_credentials: test@perkorbit.app / Perk@1234 · PIN 1234 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Login + PIN setup + skip-tour flow works end-to-end.
seed_data_creation: None. Test created 3 docs in MongoDB card_clicks collection via /api/cards/click — verified via direct Mongo query (count=3 with expected fields card_id, user_pin, category, source, at).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Biometric WebAuthn cannot be exercised in headless Playwright because PublicKeyCredential.isUserVerifyingPlatformAuthenticatorAvailable() returns false — the settings-biometric-card and biometric-trigger are intentionally hidden, which is the documented graceful-degradation path. To validate the positive path, manual testing on a real device (Mac TouchID / Android fingerprint / Windows Hello) is required. CardOptimizer is fully working and affiliate-ready.

validations_performed.GET /api/cards: 200 · 7 cards, 7 categories, all required fields present
validations_performed.GET /api/cards/best?category=fuel&monthl: 200 · top result = icici-coral-fuel (BPCL SBI Octane), results sorted desc by net_annual_value_inr, all 4 score fields populated
validations_performed.POST /api/cards/click (with & without pi: 200 {ok:true} · 3 docs persisted in MongoDB card_clicks collection
